message:
fix(parser): handle quoted identifiers with spaces and stabilize hash function

Rewrite normalize_identifier in both mermaid and dot parsers to
properly preserve spaces-as-underscores within quoted strings instead
of truncating at the first whitespace. Also rewrite
parse_subgraph_statement to use a new extract_quoted_or_word helper
for robust subgraph ID/title parsing with quoted strings.

Replace DefaultHasher in stable_u64_hash with an inline FNV-1a
implementation to ensure hash stability across Rust toolchain versions.
This changes the malformed_recovery golden checksum since the node ID
now correctly captures the full identifier.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
